reviews.review_description: Junk
ITS BEEN SO LONG WE NEED UPDATES I PLAY IT AND SEE NO ONE IF YOU MAKE AN UPDATE ILL PLAY WITH PEOPLE

Hello everybody, my name is Jimmy the turkey and I just wanted to let you guys know that if you want to learn how to fly if you just go into your shop and get the trailer and you grab it and then put one of your hands on the actual trailer and then push downward you can actually fly, but some people are abusing it and there’s also a glitch where if you take wood and you hold it and then Put it in the sewing machine while somebody from the other side is chopping the wood your game will break but they’ll get like $4 billion also moderators and devs and whoever the owner is you also need to patch the glitch where you can get every tree in the mat broken at onceyou turn off your Wi-Fi and then you hit one tree and then you buy ax and then for some reason, every tree will be broken. Please fix it but anyways out of anything this game is very great.

Why am i losing my hachet when i rejoin
>:(
Good game i liked it but it needs single player mode
Great game me and my lil cousin love it
When i was playing I left the game with the money equivalent to 0 and wasn't able to play the game.

Loaded the game. I can move around but nothing else. Can’t buy land. Can’t buy axe. No trees in the world at all. Can’t see my own hands.  I’m confused as to what’s wrong. I’ve uninstalled and reinstalled and no change. Please help as this game seems like something I’d love.

The games been fixed and is now playable, no more unloaded trees and shop items, no more clipping through a floor, and no more not having a hands or any way to more, thank you devs.

My “very valid” Opinion on the game: 
It is a little jank in some areas, be careful when dropping items because they can clip through the ground if you accidentally place them in the ground but besides that it’s pretty simple and easy to learn and play.

👍👍👍

reviews.review_title: Good game but needs turn feature
reviews.review_description: I tried out this game because I played similar games and I wanted to know what it would be like to be a lumber man in vr. I liked this game but it needs a turn feature cause my boundary is kinda bad like if I turn around irl then I could hit an object and it’s only good if I have a turn feature so please add a feature where you can move your joystick to either have a smooth turning motion or a snap without the motion and we can set the speed. Thank you and do it if you can.
Really good game worth your time

It’s a good game, just needs a couple of bug fixes and content update. Don’t know why there are so many bad reviews. It’s probably because none of the toddlers that play this game have patience lol, I’d say give it a minute and let the devs cook.
